extensionDescription.message: Routes selected sites through your local proxy while all other sites connect directly.

optionsInterfaceDescription.message: Choose the language used by the Popup and Options pages. Auto follows Chrome on this device; the choice is stored locally.

optionsLanguageSaveFailed.message: Could not save the interface language.

commonAndMore.description: Shared UI message. DOMAINS is a displayed hostname list and must remain unchanged; COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

validationOnlyHttpHttps.message: Only http and https URLs can be normalized.

validationInvalidHostname.message: Enter a valid domain or URL.

validationUnsupportedProxyScheme.message: Choose a supported local proxy scheme.

validationProxyHostInvalid.message: Enter a local proxy host without spaces or PAC separators.

validationProxyPortInvalid.message: Enter a local proxy port from 1 to 65535.

validationInternalPageCannotRoute.message: Internal browser pages cannot be routed.

validationPrivateCannotRoute.message: Private network addresses cannot be routed.

validationInternalDomainCannotRoute.message: Internal local domains cannot be routed.

validationPublicDomainRequired.message: Enter a public domain with a dot.

validationOpenPublicDomain.message: Open a public domain with a dot to manage a site rule.

validationOpenValidSite.message: Open a valid http or https site to manage a rule.

validationProtocolCannotRoute.message: $PROTOCOL$ pages cannot be routed. Open an http or https site first.
validationProtocolCannotRoute.description: Validation message. PROTOCOL is a technical URL scheme and must remain unchanged.

ruleSource.description: Route-rule message. SOURCE is the stored technical source value.

ruleScopeMoreHostsWarning.message: This rule will apply to more hostnames.

ruleOtherSubdomains.description: Route-rule message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

ruleTargetWithSubdomains.description: Route-rule message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

ruleTargetExact.description: Route-rule message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

ruleDuplicateEditExisting.message: An identical rule already exists. Keep the existing rule and cancel this edit.

ruleNoLongerAvailableRefresh.message: The rule is no longer available. Refresh the rule list and try again.

ruleIdentityAmbiguous.message: The rule identity is ambiguous. No changes were saved.

ruleBroaderScopeUnavailable.message: That broader scope is not available for this hostname. Choose a safe exact or hostname scope.

ruleNoLongerAvailable.message: The rule is no longer available. No changes were saved.

ruleConflictNoLongerAvailable.message: That route-target conflict is no longer available. Refresh and try again.

ruleConflictNoAction.message: No $ACTION$ rule is available for that route target.
ruleConflictNoAction.description: Route-rule message. ACTION is the localized route action.

ruleSameActionExists.message: The same $ACTION$ already exists for this $SCOPE$.
ruleSameActionExists.description: Route-rule message. ACTION is the localized route action; SCOPE is the localized rule scope.

ruleCoveredBy.description: Route-rule message. PARENT is a normalized parent hostname and must remain unchanged; ACTION is the localized route action; SCOPE is the localized rule scope.

ruleExistingParentSameRoute.message: An existing parent rule $PARENT$ already provides the same route.
ruleExistingParentSameRoute.description: Route-rule message. PARENT is a normalized parent hostname and must remain unchanged.

ruleOverridesParentWarning.message: This $ACTION$ rule will override the broader $PARENT_ACTION$ rule $PARENT$ within its scope.
ruleOverridesParentWarning.description: Route-rule message. ACTION is the localized route action; PARENT_ACTION is the localized parent route action; PARENT is a normalized parent hostname and must remain unchanged.

ruleChildRedundantWarning.message: This broader $ACTION$ rule will make $CHILD$ redundant. It will not be removed automatically.
ruleChildRedundantWarning.description: Route-rule message. ACTION is the localized route action; CHILD is a normalized child hostname and must remain unchanged.

ruleChildExceptionWarning.message: This broader $ACTION$ rule will contain a $CHILD_ACTION$ child exception at $CHILD$. The $CHILD_ACTION$ exception will continue to win.
ruleChildExceptionWarning.description: Route-rule message. ACTION is the localized route action; CHILD_ACTION is the localized child route action; CHILD is a normalized child hostname and must remain unchanged.

ruleOppositeActionExists.message: An opposite-action $ACTION$ rule already exists for the same hostname and scope. Edit that rule instead.
ruleOppositeActionExists.description: Route-rule message. ACTION is the localized route action.

ruleConflictSaveBlocked.message: Conflicting route rules must be resolved explicitly before these synced settings can be saved.

ruleProxyDirectExists.message: A Proxy/Direct rule already exists for this hostname and scope. Edit the existing rule instead.

ruleConflictUseKeep.message: Use Keep Proxy or Keep Direct to resolve conflicting route rules explicitly.

ruleConflictResolveBeforeEdit.message: Resolve this conflicting route target with Keep Proxy or Keep Direct before editing it.

ruleActionExistsForScope.message: A $ACTION$ rule already exists for this hostname and scope. Edit existing rule instead.
ruleActionExistsForScope.description: Route-rule message. ACTION is the localized route action.

ruleActionExistsForDomainScope.message: A $ACTION$ rule already exists for $HOSTNAME$ with the same scope. Edit existing rule instead.
ruleActionExistsForDomainScope.description: Route-rule message. ACTION is the localized route action; HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupIntro.message: Manage the current site with explicit synced proxy or direct route rules.

popupNewRuleScopeCopy.message: Applies to this hostname and its subdomains.

popupNoMatchingRule.message: No matching rule. Default route is direct.

popupConflictExactSource.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupConflictParentSource.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupConflictExplanation.message: $ACTION$ is currently effective through $SOURCE$. Resolve this configuration in Options.
popupConflictExplanation.description: Popup UI message. ACTION is the localized route action; SOURCE is the stored technical source value.

popupWarningAria.description: Popup UI message. LABEL is a localized control label; EXPLANATION is a localized route explanation.

popupExactProxyExplanation.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupParentProxyExplanation.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupExactDirectExplanation.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupParentDirectExplanation.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupProxyDisabledExplanation.message: $EXPLANATION$. Local proxy is disabled or invalid on this device.
popupProxyDisabledExplanation.description: Popup UI message. EXPLANATION is a localized route explanation.

popupAriaRouteStatus.description: Popup UI message. LABEL is a localized control label; EXPLANATION is a localized route explanation.

popupSyncedDenylistBlocked.message: $HOSTNAME$ is blocked by the synced denylist. Open Options to review stored lists.
popupSyncedDenylistBlocked.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupConflictEffective.message: Conflicting rules. $ACTION$ is currently effective, but this configuration must be resolved in Options.
popupConflictEffective.description: Popup UI message. ACTION is the localized route action.

popupExactProxy.message: $HOSTNAME$ uses proxy via an exact synced rule.
popupExactProxy.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupExactDirect.message: $HOSTNAME$ goes direct via an exact synced rule.
popupExactDirect.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupParentProxy.message: $HOSTNAME$ uses proxy via parent rule $PARENT$. Open Options to edit it.
popupParentProxy.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged; PARENT is a normalized parent hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupParentDirect.message: $HOSTNAME$ goes direct via parent rule $PARENT$. Open Options to edit it.
popupParentDirect.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged; PARENT is a normalized parent hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupDefaultDirect.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupOpenSupportedSite.message: Open a supported site to manage a proxy routing rule.

popupOpenRegularWebsite.message: Open a regular website tab to add a proxy route.

popupUseExplicitControls.message: Use explicit controls to update synced site rules.

popupExactRuleGone.message: The exact rule is no longer available. Reopen the popup and try again.

popupOnlyExactExpandable.message: Only an exact rule can be expanded here.

popupChooseBroaderScope.message: Choose a broader scope and review the preview before confirming.

popupScopeChangeCancelled.message: Scope change cancelled. No rule was changed.

popupScopeActionPreserved.description: Popup UI message. ACTION is the localized route action.

popupScopeChanged.message: Updated the synced rule for $HOSTNAME$ with the selected scope.
popupScopeChanged.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupRuleAlreadyExists.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged; ACTION is the localized route action.

popupRuleInherited.message: $HOSTNAME$ already uses $ACTION$ via parent rule $PARENT$. Open Options to edit it.
popupRuleInherited.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged; ACTION is the localized route action; PARENT is a normalized parent hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupRuleAdded.description: Popup UI message. ACTION is the localized route action; HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupExactRuleRemoved.message: Removed the exact synced rule for $HOSTNAME$.
popupExactRuleRemoved.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupNoExactRule.message: No exact synced rule exists for $HOSTNAME$.
popupNoExactRule.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupParentRuleEdit.message: $HOSTNAME$ is routed by parent rule $PARENT$. Open Options to edit parent rules.
popupParentRuleEdit.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged; PARENT is a normalized parent hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupDiagnosticResolveConflict.message: Resolve the conflicting route rules in Options before adding a diagnostic rule.

popupDiagnosticReachableCanAdd.message: This site appears reachable through your local proxy. You can add it as a synced proxy route.

popupDiagnosticReachableCovered.message: This site appears reachable through your local proxy. A synced rule already covers it.

popupDiagnosticUnreachableCovered.message: A synced rule covers this site, but it did not appear reachable through your local proxy. Check your local proxy settings.

popupDiagnosticUnreachable.message: This site did not appear reachable through your local proxy.

popupCheckingProxy.message: Checking via your configured local proxy...

popupOpenSiteBeforeCheck.message: Open a supported site before checking proxy reachability.

popupRunSuccessfulCheck.message: Run a successful proxy check before adding a diagnostic rule.

popupRunCheckAgain.message: Run the proxy check again for the current site before adding a rule.

popupRelatedExactRuleExists.message: Exact rule already exists for $HOSTNAME$; this would extend it to subdomains.
popupRelatedExactRuleExists.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedActionConflict.message: An exact rule already exists for $HOSTNAME$ with a different action; no automatic change was made.
popupRelatedActionConflict.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedExpandedAria.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedCoveredBy.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedAddExact.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedAddParent.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedBatchAddOne.description: Popup UI message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

popupRelatedBatchAddFew.description: Popup UI message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

popupRelatedBatchAddMany.description: Popup UI message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

popupRelatedBatchAddOther.description: Popup UI message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

popupRelatedSelectAria.description: Popup UI message. ACTION is the localized route action.

popupRelatedObservedHosts.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAMES is a displayed hostname list and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedAddedAria.message: $HOSTNAME$ was added as a proxy route
popupRelatedAddedAria.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedOverrideIgnoredSaved.message: $HOSTNAME$ will be ignored globally. Preview refreshed.
popupRelatedOverrideIgnoredSaved.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedOverrideReviewSaved.message: $HOSTNAME$ will stay in manual review globally. Preview refreshed.
popupRelatedOverrideReviewSaved.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedOverrideSuggestedSaved.message: $HOSTNAME$ will be suggested for this site. Preview refreshed.
popupRelatedOverrideSuggestedSaved.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedOverrideSiteIgnoredSaved.message: $HOSTNAME$ will be ignored for this site. Preview refreshed.
popupRelatedOverrideSiteIgnoredSaved.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedNoRequestHosts.message: No request hostnames were captured during this session. Some worker, service-worker, or browser-level requests may be outside this privacy-preserving recorder.

popupRelatedNoResourceHosts.message: No page resource hosts were found. Try reloading the page, then preview again.

popupRelatedOnlyIgnored.message: Resource hosts were found, but they look like analytics/adtech/local or schema helper domains. No rules were saved.

popupRelatedNoCandidates.message: Resource hosts were found, but no new related-domain candidates were identified. No rules were saved.

popupRelatedAllCovered.message: Resource hosts were found, but they are already covered by existing rules. No rules were saved.

popupRelatedSelectOne.message: Select at least one related domain before adding rules.

popupRelatedNoNewRules.message: No new related-domain rules were added; selected domains are already covered.

popupRelatedAddedRoutes.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAMES is a displayed hostname list and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedAddedRoute.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAMES is a displayed hostname list and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedExpandedRoute.message: Expanded the synced $ACTION$ route for $HOSTNAME$ to include subdomains.
popupRelatedExpandedRoute.description: Popup UI message. ACTION is the localized route action; HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedExpandedRoutes.message: Expanded synced routes to include subdomains for $HOSTNAMES$.
popupRelatedExpandedRoutes.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAMES is a displayed hostname list and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedAddedAndExpanded.message: Added $ADDED$ synced route(s) and expanded $EXPANDED$ existing route(s).
popupRelatedAddedAndExpanded.description: Popup UI message. ADDED and EXPANDED are displayed numeric counts.

popupRelatedPreviewIntro.message: Related-domain preview found candidates. No rules were saved yet. $DETAILS$.
popupRelatedPreviewIntro.description: Popup UI message. DETAILS is a localized summary.

popupRelatedLikely.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAMES is a displayed hostname list and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedReview.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAMES is a displayed hostname list and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedIgnoredCount.message: $COUNT$ analytics, helper, or infrastructure hosts ignored
popupRelatedIgnoredCount.description: Popup UI message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

popupRelatedIgnoredCountOne.message: $COUNT$ analytics, helper, or infrastructure host ignored
popupRelatedIgnoredCountOne.description: Popup UI message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

popupRelatedCoveredCount.description: Popup UI message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

popupRelatedCoveredCountOne.description: Popup UI message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

popupRelatedHiddenSaveable.description: Popup UI message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

popupRelatedHiddenSaveableOne.description: Popup UI message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

popupRelatedHiddenCovered.description: Popup UI message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

popupRelatedHiddenCoveredOne.description: Popup UI message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

popupRelatedHiddenIgnored.description: Popup UI message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

popupPreviewDetails.message: Preview details: $INSPECTED$ inspected; $REQUESTS$ request initiations; $PERFORMANCE$ performance; $ATTRIBUTES$ DOM resource attributes; $VALUES$ URL-like values; $HOSTS$ sanitized hosts; $IGNORED$ ignored or internal; $COVERED$ already covered; $SAVEABLE$ saveable.
popupPreviewDetails.description: Popup UI message. INSPECTED is the inspected-element count; REQUESTS is the recorded-request count; PERFORMANCE is the performance-entry count; ATTRIBUTES is the inspected attribute count; VALUES is a displayed normalized-domain list and must remain unchanged; HOSTS is the collected-host count; IGNORED is the ignored-item count; COVERED is the number of covered candidates; SAVEABLE is the saveable-candidate count.

popupPreviewDropped.message: Dropped performance entries reported by the browser: $COUNT$.
popupPreviewDropped.description: Popup UI message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

popupPreviewHosts.description: Popup UI message. HOSTNAMES is a displayed hostname list and must remain unchanged.

popupRelatedPreviewAgainOverride.message: Preview related domains again for the current site before saving an override.

popupRelatedChooseOverride.message: Choose a supported classification override action.

popupRelatedPreviewAgainAdd.message: Preview related domains again for the current site before adding candidates.

popupPreviewingRelated.message: Previewing related domains from current-page resources...

popupRecordingStarting.message: Starting diagnostic recording for this tab...

popupRecordingStopping.message: Stopping diagnostic recording and preparing preview...

popupOpenSiteBeforePreview.message: Open a supported site before previewing related domains.

popupOpenSiteBeforeRecording.message: Open a supported site before starting diagnostic recording.

popupOpenRecordedSite.message: Open the recorded site before stopping diagnostic recording.

popupRecordedSession.description: Popup UI message. MESSAGE is a localized nested status message.

popupCouldNotUpdateScope.message: Could not update the rule scope.

popupCouldNotAddSite.message: Could not add the current site.

popupCouldNotAddDirect.message: Could not add the direct route.

popupCouldNotRemoveSite.message: Could not remove the current site.

popupCouldNotCheckProxy.message: Could not complete the proxy check.

popupCouldNotAddRelated.message: Could not add the related domain.

popupCouldNotAddSelected.message: Could not add selected related domains.

popupCouldNotSaveOverride.message: Could not save the classification override.

popupCouldNotAddChecked.message: Could not add the checked site.

popupCouldNotLoad.message: Could not load the current site.

optionsIntro.message: Configure the local proxy for this device and manage synced proxy and direct route rules.

optionsLocalProxyDescription.message: Stored only on this Chrome installation. Host and port are not synced to other devices.

optionsEnableProxy.message: Enable proxy routing on this device

optionsRulesDescription.message: Stored in Chrome Sync. Adding or removing a rule requires an explicit action; the extension does not auto-add domains.

optionsRuleScopeHint.message: Choose the exact coverage explicitly; no parent domain is inferred.

optionsConflictsDescription.message: Both Proxy and Direct are configured for the same hostname and scope. Choose the one route that should remain; nothing is removed automatically.

optionsSafeParentHint.message: A safe parent-domain option appears only when PSL-aware planning permits it.

optionsOptimizeDescription.message: Find same-action child rules already covered by broader parent rules. Nothing is removed automatically.

optionsDenylistDescription.message: Read-only in this slice. Editing these lists will be added separately if needed.

optionsOverridesDescription.message: Stored in Chrome Sync as domain-level personal preferences. Removing an override does not change proxy routing rules.

optionsBackupDescription.message: Export and import local user-controlled backups. No cloud upload, telemetry, backend, raw URLs, diagnostic sessions, or page content are included.

optionsIncludeLocalProxy.message: Include local proxy config for this device

optionsLocalProxyBackupHint.message: Local proxy host and port are device-specific and are excluded by default. Include them only for a backup you control.

optionsImportPlaceholder.message: Paste a Smart Proxy Route Helper settings export JSON document

optionsResolveConflictsForList.message: Resolve the conflicting route targets above to return to a normal rule list.

optionsEditRuleAria.description: Options UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

optionsRemoveRuleAria.description: Options UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

optionsConflictDetail.message: Both Proxy and Direct are configured. $DETAIL$
optionsConflictDetail.description: Options UI message. DETAIL is a localized status detail.

optionsConflictEffective.message: $ACTION$ is temporarily effective because the newest createdAt wins, then the later stored position breaks a tie.
optionsConflictEffective.description: Options UI message. ACTION is the localized route action.

optionsConflictTieBreaker.message: The runtime still uses its deterministic tie-breaker.

optionsKeepProxyAria.message: Keep Proxy for $TARGET$ and remove the Direct sibling
optionsKeepProxyAria.description: Options UI message. TARGET is a localized route-target description.

optionsKeepDirectAria.message: Keep Direct for $TARGET$ and remove the Proxy sibling
optionsKeepDirectAria.description: Options UI message. TARGET is a localized route-target description.

optionsCoveredBy.description: Options UI message. REASON is a localized candidate reason; HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

optionsRemoveSuggestionAria.description: Options UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

optionsDenylistValues.description: Options UI message. HOSTNAMES is a displayed hostname list and must remain unchanged.

optionsIgnoredValues.description: Options UI message. HOSTNAMES is a displayed hostname list and must remain unchanged.

optionsGlobalOverride.description: Options UI message. ACTION is the localized route action.

optionsSiteOverride.description: Options UI message. SITE is a normalized site hostname and must remain unchanged; ACTION is the localized route action.

optionsRemoveOverrideAria.description: Options UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged; SITE is a normalized site hostname and must remain unchanged.

optionsRemoveGlobalOverrideAria.description: Options UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

optionsFixProxy.message: Fix the highlighted local proxy setting before saving.

optionsProxySaved.message: Local proxy settings saved on this device.

optionsRuleDuplicate.message: $HOSTNAME$ already has that synced route rule.
optionsRuleDuplicate.description: Options UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

optionsRuleAdded.description: Options UI message. ACTION is the localized route action; HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

optionsConflictResolved.message: $ACTION$ will remain for $TARGET$. $COUNT$ contradictory sibling rules were removed in one synced write.
optionsConflictResolved.description: Options UI message. ACTION is the localized route action; TARGET is a localized route-target description; COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

optionsConflictResolvedOne.message: $ACTION$ will remain for $TARGET$. $COUNT$ contradictory sibling rule was removed in one synced write.
optionsConflictResolvedOne.description: Options UI message. ACTION is the localized route action; TARGET is a localized route-target description; COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

optionsChangesNotSaved.message: Changes are not saved yet. Preview the edit to continue.

optionsChooseRule.message: Choose a rule to edit first.

optionsPreviewValidEdit.message: Preview a valid rule edit before saving.

optionsRuleUpdated.message: Updated $HOSTNAME$ atomically. The existing rule identity and metadata were preserved.
optionsRuleUpdated.description: Options UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

optionsRuleGone.message: That rule is no longer available. Refresh and try again.

optionsEditingRule.message: Editing $HOSTNAME$. Nothing changes until Save changes.
optionsEditingRule.description: Options UI message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

optionsRuleRemovalNotFound.message: The selected rule is no longer available. Nothing was removed.

optionsRuleRemovalAmbiguous.message: The selected rule cannot be safely identified because multiple matching rules exist. Nothing was removed.

optionsCleanupComplete.message: Rule cleanup scan complete. Nothing was removed automatically.

optionsOverrideRemoveUnknown.message: Could not identify the classification override to remove.

optionsExportWithProxy.message: Export JSON generated with local proxy config included.

optionsExportWithoutProxy.message: Export JSON generated without local proxy config.

optionsFixImport.message: Fix the import JSON before applying changes.

optionsImportPreviewReady.message: Import preview ready. Review it before applying changes.

optionsPreviewValidImport.message: Preview a valid import before applying it.

optionsProxyRestored.message: Local proxy settings restored on this device.

backupLocalApplyFailedSyncRestored.message: Local proxy settings were not applied. Synced settings were restored to their previous values. Review the local proxy and try the import again.

backupLocalApplyFailedSyncRollbackFailed.message: Local proxy settings were not applied, but the synced import was applied and could not be rolled back. Review synced rules and local proxy settings before retrying.

optionsRunCleanup.message: Run a scan to find redundant route rules.

optionsPasteImport.message: Paste export JSON to preview import.

optionsCouldNotPreviewEdit.message: Could not preview the rule edit.

optionsCouldNotSaveEdit.message: Could not save the rule edit.

optionsEditCancelled.message: Rule edit cancelled. No rule was changed.

optionsImportRouteSummary.message: Route rules: $IMPORTABLE$ importable, $ADDED$ new, $DUPLICATES$ duplicate matches, $SKIPPED$ skipped.
optionsImportRouteSummary.description: Options UI message. IMPORTABLE is the importable-item count; ADDED is the number of added items; DUPLICATES is the duplicate-item count; SKIPPED is the skipped-item count.

optionsImportOverrideSummary.message: Classification overrides: $IMPORTABLE$ importable, $UPDATED$ added or updated, $SKIPPED$ skipped.
optionsImportOverrideSummary.description: Options UI message. IMPORTABLE is the importable-item count; UPDATED is the updated-item count; SKIPPED is the skipped-item count.

optionsImportIgnoredSummary.message: Ignored domains: $IMPORTABLE$ importable, $ADDED$ new, $DUPLICATES$ duplicate, $SKIPPED$ skipped.
optionsImportIgnoredSummary.description: Options UI message. IMPORTABLE is the importable-item count; ADDED is the number of added items; DUPLICATES is the duplicate-item count; SKIPPED is the skipped-item count.

optionsImportDenylistSummary.description: Options UI message. IMPORTABLE is the importable-item count; ADDED is the number of added items; DUPLICATES is the duplicate-item count; SKIPPED is the skipped-item count.

optionsImportProxyIncluded.message: Local proxy config: included and will be applied after confirmation.

backupProxyShapeSkipped.message: Local proxy settings were skipped because their shape is not supported.

backupProxyInvalidSkipped.message: Local proxy settings were skipped because the proxy host, scheme, or port is invalid.

backupRulesSkipped.message: Invalid or protected route rule items skipped: $COUNT$.
backupRulesSkipped.description: Settings backup or import message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

backupRuleDuplicates.message: Same-action route rule duplicates found in the imported file: $COUNT$.
backupRuleDuplicates.description: Settings backup or import message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

backupImportedConflict.message: Imported rules contain both Proxy and Direct for $HOSTNAME$ $SCOPE$. Choose one action in the import file before applying.
backupImportedConflict.description: Settings backup or import message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged; SCOPE is the localized rule scope.

backupIgnoredSkipped.message: Invalid, duplicate, or protected ignored-domain items skipped: $COUNT$.
backupIgnoredSkipped.description: Settings backup or import message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

backupDenylistSkipped.message: Invalid, duplicate, or protected denylist items skipped: $COUNT$.
backupDenylistSkipped.description: Settings backup or import message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

backupOverridesSkipped.message: Invalid or protected classification override items skipped: $COUNT$.
backupOverridesSkipped.description: Settings backup or import message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

backupRuleConflictExisting.message: Imported $ACTION$ rule conflicts with the existing $EXISTING_ACTION$ rule for $HOSTNAME$ $SCOPE$.
backupRuleConflictExisting.description: Settings backup or import message. ACTION is the localized route action; EXISTING_ACTION is the localized stored route action; HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged; SCOPE is the localized rule scope.

backupResolveConflictsExport.message: Resolve conflicting route rules before exporting settings. No backup was generated.

backupPasteJson.message: Paste a settings export JSON document before previewing import.

backupJsonParseFailed.message: Import JSON could not be parsed.

backupJsonObjectRequired.message: Import JSON must be an object.

backupWrongFormat.message: Import JSON is not a Smart Proxy Route Helper settings export.

backupUnsupportedVersion.message: Import JSON uses an unsupported settings export version.

backupMissingSyncData.message: Import JSON does not contain supported synced settings data.

backupResolveConflictsImport.message: Resolve the existing conflicting route rules before applying an import.

backupPreviewValid.message: Preview a valid settings import before applying it.

backupResolveThenPreview.message: Resolve the existing conflicting route rules, then preview the import again.

backupRulesChanged.message: Synced route rules changed after preview. Preview the import again before applying it.

backupSettingsChanged.message: Synced settings changed after preview. Preview the import again before applying it.

diagnosticConfigureProxy.message: Configure local proxy in Options first.

diagnosticReachable.message: This site appears reachable through your local proxy.

diagnosticUnreachable.message: This site did not appear reachable through your local proxy.

diagnosticCheckFailed.message: Could not complete the proxy check.

diagnosticRestoreFailed.message: Diagnostic finished, but proxy routing could not be restored: $ERROR$
diagnosticRestoreFailed.description: Current-site diagnostic message. ERROR is a localized error detail.

diagnosticOpenValidSite.message: Open a valid http or https site before checking proxy reachability.

diagnosticInternalPage.message: Internal browser pages cannot be checked through proxy.

diagnosticLocalhost.message: Localhost cannot be checked through proxy.

diagnosticLoopback.message: Loopback addresses cannot be checked through proxy.

diagnosticPrivate.message: Private network addresses cannot be checked through proxy.

diagnosticInternalDomain.message: Internal local domains cannot be checked through proxy.

diagnosticOpenPublicDomain.message: Open a public domain with a dot before checking proxy reachability.

diagnosticSiteCannotCheck.message: This site cannot be checked through proxy.

diagnosticOpenSupportedSite.message: Open a supported site before checking proxy reachability.

diagnosticProtocolCannotCheck.message: $PROTOCOL$ pages cannot be checked through proxy. Open an http or https site first.
diagnosticProtocolCannotCheck.description: Current-site diagnostic message. PROTOCOL is a technical URL scheme and must remain unchanged.

recordingExpiredAction.message: Diagnostic recording for $HOSTNAME$ auto-expired. Stop and preview captured hosts, or cancel it.
recordingExpiredAction.description: Diagnostic recording message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

recordingActive.message: Diagnostic recording is active for $HOSTNAME$. No data is saved until you use an add action.
recordingActive.description: Diagnostic recording message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

recordingActiveOtherTab.message: Diagnostic recording is already active for $HOSTNAME$ in another tab. Return to that tab to stop and preview, or cancel it.
recordingActiveOtherTab.description: Diagnostic recording message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

recordingAlreadyActive.message: Diagnostic recording is already active for $HOSTNAME$.
recordingAlreadyActive.description: Diagnostic recording message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

recordingStarted.message: Diagnostic recording started for $HOSTNAME$. Perform the action, then reopen the popup and choose Stop and preview. No rules will be saved automatically.
recordingStarted.description: Diagnostic recording message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

recordingBelongsOtherTab.message: Diagnostic recording belongs to $HOSTNAME$ in another tab. Return to that tab to stop and preview, or cancel it.
recordingBelongsOtherTab.description: Diagnostic recording message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

recordingExpiredNavigation.message: Diagnostic recording for $HOSTNAME$ expired because the tab navigated or reloaded. Start a new recording on the loaded page.
recordingExpiredNavigation.description: Diagnostic recording message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

recordingExpiredDocument.message: Diagnostic recording for $HOSTNAME$ expired because the page reloaded, navigated, or replaced the recorded document. Start a new recording on the loaded page.
recordingExpiredDocument.description: Diagnostic recording message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

recordingExpiredPreview.message: Diagnostic recording for $HOSTNAME$ expired. Previewing hosts captured before expiration. No rules were saved.
recordingExpiredPreview.description: Diagnostic recording message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

recordingStoppedPreview.message: Diagnostic recording stopped for $HOSTNAME$. Previewing recorded hosts. No rules were saved.
recordingStoppedPreview.description: Diagnostic recording message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

recordingCancelled.message: Diagnostic recording for $HOSTNAME$ was cancelled. No candidates were returned and no rules were saved.
recordingCancelled.description: Diagnostic recording message. HOSTNAME is a normalized hostname and must remain unchanged.

recordingTabUnavailable.message: Could not identify the active tab for diagnostic recording.

recordingBridgeFailed.message: Could not start the diagnostic recording bridge on this page.

recordingBridgeMissing.message: No matching diagnostic recording bridge was found on this page.

recordingMainMissing.message: No matching MAIN-world recorder was found on this page.

recordingMainCaptureFailed.message: Could not start MAIN-world request capture on this page.

recordingAutomaticFailed.message: Could not start automatic request recording on this page. Chrome may not allow temporary script access here.

recordingStopPreviewFailed.message: Could not stop and preview this recording. Temporary hooks were cancelled where the page remained accessible.

recordingOpenValidSite.message: Open a valid http or https site before starting diagnostic recording.

recordingInternalPage.message: Internal browser pages cannot be used for diagnostic recording.

recordingLocalhost.message: Localhost cannot be used for diagnostic recording.

recordingLoopback.message: Loopback addresses cannot be used for diagnostic recording.

recordingPrivate.message: Private network addresses cannot be used for diagnostic recording.

recordingInternalDomain.message: Internal local domains cannot be used for diagnostic recording.

recordingOpenPublicDomain.message: Open a public domain with a dot before starting diagnostic recording.

recordingSiteCannotUse.message: This site cannot be used for diagnostic recording.

recordingOpenSupportedSite.message: Open a supported site before starting diagnostic recording.

recordingProtocolCannotUse.message: $PROTOCOL$ pages cannot be used for diagnostic recording. Open an http or https site first.
recordingProtocolCannotUse.description: Diagnostic recording message. PROTOCOL is a technical URL scheme and must remain unchanged.

previewCollectFailed.message: Could not collect resource hosts from this page.

previewCollectFailedDetail.message: Could not collect resource hosts from this page: $ERROR$
previewCollectFailedDetail.description: Related-domain preview message. ERROR is a localized error detail.

previewHostsChecked.message: Resource hosts checked for related-domain preview: $COUNT$. No rules were saved.
previewHostsChecked.description: Related-domain preview message. COUNT is the displayed numeric count.

previewErrorPageWarning.message: This page appears to be an error or protection page, so related-domain results may not represent the target site. Route or check this site through proxy, reload the page, then preview related domains.

previewOpenValidSite.message: Open a valid http or https site before previewing related domains.

previewInternalPage.message: Internal browser pages cannot be used for related-domain preview.

previewLocalhost.message: Localhost cannot be used for related-domain preview.

previewLoopback.message: Loopback addresses cannot be used for related-domain preview.

previewPrivate.message: Private network addresses cannot be used for related-domain preview.

previewInternalDomain.message: Internal local domains cannot be used for related-domain preview.

previewOpenPublicDomain.message: Open a public domain with a dot before previewing related domains.

previewSiteCannotUse.message: This site cannot be used for related-domain preview.

previewOpenSupportedSite.message: Open a supported site before previewing related domains.

previewTabUnavailable.message: Could not identify the active tab for related-domain preview.

previewProtocolCannotUse.message: $PROTOCOL$ pages cannot be used for related-domain preview. Open an http or https site first.
previewProtocolCannotUse.description: Related-domain preview message. PROTOCOL is a technical URL scheme and must remain unchanged.

overrideCandidateInvalid.message: Choose a valid public candidate domain before saving a classification override.

overrideSiteInvalid.message: Choose a valid public site domain before saving a site classification override.
